g.text: FABIO value-added per item for St. Vincent and the Grenadines (VCT); items below 3% max |share| of WB across
years are grouped as "Other". Primary (ISIC-A) row: black line = WB ag VA, grey dashed = FABIO-comparable WB
(WB minus seeds and forestry), points coloured by forestry source (see legend). Rows: primary (ISIC-A) vs
FABIO value-added [COMBINED_GLORIA] vs World Bank agricultural value-added — St. Vincent and the Grenadines (VCT)
